svg.text: * Supervised Learning: Models learn from labeled training data to make

text.font-family: Cascadia Code, Fira Code, JetBrains Mono, monospace

svg.text: predictions on unseen examples. Common algorithms include linear

text.font-family: Cascadia Code, Fira Code, JetBrains Mono, monospace

svg.text: regression, decision trees, and neural networks.

text.font-family: Cascadia Code, Fira Code, JetBrains Mono, monospace

svg.text: * Unsupervised Learning: Discovers hidden patterns in unlabeled data

text.font-family: Cascadia Code, Fira Code, JetBrains Mono, monospace
Cascadia Code, Fira Code, JetBrains Mono, monospace

svg.text: * Model Evaluation: Use train/test splits and cross-validation to

text.font-family: Cascadia Code, Fira Code, JetBrains Mono, monospace

svg.text: measure generalization. Key metrics: accuracy, precision, recall, F1.
